description.initial: Colorful canopies line the market, and every kind of thing imaginable is sold beneath them. One merchant sells bottled storm clouds; another offers sky fish that somehow swim through open air. Voices bargaining over prices layer over each other. The smell of grilled meat and fresh bread reaches you before the stalls do.
description.return: The bustling Sky Market. Vendors call out their wares and customers weave between the colorful stalls.
description.atmospheric: Someone is playing a stringed instrument somewhere, its melody weaving through the market's chaos. The music is beautiful and slightly melancholy.

north.blockedMessage: The market extends no further north. The edge of the platform lies ahead.

npcs.dialogue: "Fresh bread! Dried fruits! Water skins for the long journey! Best prices in all of Nephelia, I promise you that. Take something for the road, traveler, you never know when your next meal will be up here in the clouds."

dialogueConditions.text: "Ah, the brave cargo runner! Can I interest you in some supplies for wherever Zara is taking you next?"

items.itemMessage: You eat the fresh bread. It's still warm from the oven.
You eat the sweet dried fruits. Perfect for long journeys.
You drink deeply from the water skin. Refreshing!
You drink from the flask. Clean, cold water collected from the clouds.

interactables.name: Silk Stall
interactables.examineText: Rolls of the most beautiful fabric you've ever seen. The silk seems to shimmer with inner light, shifting through colors like oil on water. A sign reads: 'Cloud Silk, Woven from morning mist by the master weavers of the Eastern Peaks.'
interactables.interactionText: The merchant smiles at your interest. 'Beautiful, isn't it? Light as air, strong as steel, and it never wrinkles. A bargain at only fifty gold crowns per roll!''

interactables.name: Bottled Clouds
interactables.examineText: Actual clouds trapped in glass bottles. Some are white and fluffy, others dark and stormy, one even has tiny lightning bolts crackling inside. The merchant catches you looking and winks.
interactables.interactionText: 'Ah, you have a good eye! That storm cloud is a rare piece. Captured from the Great Tempest of last summer. Really impresses people at parties when you open it!'

interactables.name: Street Food Vendor
interactables.examineText: A small stall selling grilled skewers of meat and vegetables, fresh flatbread, and what appears to be fried pastries dusted with sugar. The smell is wonderful.
